issue: Bar value labels (€112.800, €98.200) are quite light grey against white, slightly low contrast; minor visual noise from reference dashed line spanning all quarters.

Delta indicator (▲ €2.740 t.o.v. Q4) shown as upward green for a cost increase; semantically correct that it's status-only green, but a cost rise being green-positive is mildly counterintuitive without a down-trend red option.

Category labels collide with 'Werkelijk' suffix ('OnderhoudWerkelijk' runs together with no spacing); donut segment boundaries are nearly invisible — only one navy hue used, segments lack differentiation.
Down-delta pills (▼ 3,1% and ▼ 5,1%) are rendered in red/orange tones which violate the 'no orange / status-only green' rule; reduce-deltas should reuse neutral or the brand palette.
